---
title: "exploratory"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```


```{r}
dat <- read.csv(here('data', 'data_final', 'clean01_datacenter.csv'))
```

```{r}
dat %>% filter(stage == "Operational", capacity_type== "Hyperscaler") %>% nrow()
dat %>% filter(stage == "Operational", capacity_type== "Hyperscaler", !is.na(year_operational)) %>% nrow()
dat %>% filter(stage == "Operational", capacity_type== "Hyperscaler", !is.na(power_builtout)) %>% nrow()
```
```{r}
dat %>% filter(stage == "Operational", year_operational <= 2024, year_operational >= 2014) %>% nrow()
```
